title: .. preview
content:
as mentioned the other day, i need to redo (again!) the tbox - both the layout and some part of code. mainly because i've decided to change the way i'm going to write stuff up here.

anyway, got a new screenshot to show off. the actual  "prototype":tbox_v40/tbox4.php  is also online. (mind you, all the links are  **NOT**  working.) this is not really a re-design. i think it's more like a re-layout. :P
